title: 13 Moons install card added — app now installable directly from the page
summary: A dedicated 'Install 13 Moons' card now appears on the Today panel with step-by-step instructions for Chrome, iOS Safari, and other browsers. The install button activates automatically when your browser is ready. Layout clipping on buttons near the top of the page header has also been corrected.

title: Living Codex layer activated across the main gates
summary: The homepage and shared gateways now surface local time, saved witness records, return paths, and recent Codex updates.

title: Today in the Codex now opens the current moon directly
summary: The daily panel now links the present day into 13 Moons and the Witness Ledger without fabricating readings.

title: Artifact Registry mobile card layout normalized
summary: Shop page mobile rendering was tuned so registry cards and media frames hold their portrait layout more cleanly.

title: Portrait image fill restored for key shop media panels
summary: The Tensor media and hero portrait surfaces were adjusted to preserve consistent image fill on small screens.
